sections.title: Test Plan Identifier
sections.guidance: Unique ID, level (master/system/UAT), version date/number, author contact; revision history.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.guidance: Purpose of plan; executive summary; references to SRS/README/Project.json/API OpenAPI.
sections.encode_for_frinstore: FrinStore: Vue SPA + FastAPI marketplace for local ice cream — validate catalog, cart/checkout, orders, admin, auth/RBAC per requirements.

sections.title: Test Items
sections.guidance: What will be tested with versions: frontend build, backend API, DB schema, deployment config.

sections.title: Features To Be Tested
sections.guidance: User-visible capabilities with risk H/M/L; link to test design/case IDs.

sections.title: Features Not To Be Tested
sections.guidance: User view + justification (out of scope, stable COTS, deferred).

encode_for_frinstore.reason: Out of scope per project; method stored only.
Not performed in pre-final window; document as risk.

sections.title: Approach
sections.guidance: Methods, tools, metrics, CM, regression rules, constraints.
sections.encode_for_frinstore: Automated API checks via pytest TestClient; manual system/UAT in browser; defect log in spreadsheet; regression after fixes on linked TCs.

sections.title: Item Pass/Fail Criteria
sections.encode_for_frinstore: TC passes if expected UI/API outcome matches; critical auth/checkout/admin breaks block release.

sections.title: Suspension Criteria and Resumption Requirements
sections.guidance: When to stop testing; what must happen to resume.
sections.encode_for_frinstore: Suspend if API down or DB corrupted; resume after clean seed or service restore + smoke tests.

sections.title: Test Deliverables
sections.guidance: Plans, designs, cases, logs, incident reports, summary — align with course Doc1–Doc9 naming.
sections.encode_for_frinstore: Match PDF checklist file names for Group 6 / FrinStore.

sections.title: Environmental Needs
sections.encode_for_frinstore: Windows 10/11, Node 18+, Python 3.12+, Chrome/Edge; local uvicorn+Vite or deployed URLs.

sections.title: Responsibilities
sections.guidance: Named owners for strategy, environment, execution, approvals.
sections.encode_for_frinstore: [Map Omadley (TL), Moleta, Butad, Tamera, Ancog to testing roles]

sections.title: Staffing and Training Needs
sections.encode_for_frinstore: Brief UAT testers on demo accounts and expected happy paths.

sections.title: Risks and Contingencies
sections.guidance: People, hardware, late delivery, requirement churn.
sections.encode_for_frinstore: Single machine demo risk; proxy misconfig; SQLite file locks.

sections.title: Approvals
sections.guidance: Who signs at this plan level.
